title: Metric currents and polylipschitz forms
abstract: We construct, for a locally compact metric space $X$, a space of polylipschitz forms $\barΓ^*_c(X)$, which is a pre-dual for the space of metric currents of $\mathscr{D}_*(X)$ Ambrosio and Kirchheim. These polylipschitz forms may be seen as a substitute of differential forms in the metric setting.
comment: 36 pages. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:1809.03009
